preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.1.3: Brand-gated OAuth, checksum-verified auto-updates, Meta warmup action, and a major SEO overhaul of merlingotme.com.
whatsNew: Connecting a platform now requires an active brand — no more orphan OAuth
Auto-updates verify a SHA-256 checksum before installing the new version
Meta warmup action: gradual budget ramp for new ad accounts
merlingotme.com rewritten for search — structured data, canonical URL, richer meta
